_meta.description: Grafana-style alert with a GitLab repo reference. The agent uses GitLab as a supplementary evidence source — querying recent commits and MRs to correlate code changes with the incident.

annotations.summary: Error rate exceeded 5% threshold on api_service
annotations.description: HTTP 5xx error rate on api_service has been above 5% for 5 minutes. Likely caused by a recent deployment.

commonAnnotations.summary: Error rate exceeded 5% threshold on api_service

title: [FIRING:1] HighErrorRate critical - api_service
message:
**Firing**

HTTP 5xx error rate on api_service exceeded 5% threshold.
A recent deployment to main may have introduced a regression.
Check GitLab commits and MRs merged in the last hour.
